## Type of Change

## Device Details

If this changes device behavior, include:

- Mouse model:
- Connection type:
- Operating system:
- Device info JSON:

## Compatibility Checklist

- [ ] Existing mappings remain compatible.
- [ ] Gesture behavior is not broken.
- [ ] Horizontal Scroll behavior is not broken.
- [ ] Middle Button behavior is not broken.
- [ ] Config migration is included if config format changed.
- [ ] Documentation is updated for user-visible changes.
